differential_diagnoses: Primary cardiac diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
next_steps: 18F-FDG PET-CT scan to evaluate metabolic activity and extent of disease
Percutaneous biopsy of the cardiac mass or FDG-avid mediastinal lymph node
Pericardiocentesis with cytologic analysis and flow cytometry
Formal cardiac MRI to characterize tissue perfusion and enhancement patterns
Anticoagulation management for pulmonary embolism in the context of malignancy

differential_diagnoses: Primary cardiac diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
next_steps: Check serum lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) and beta-2 microglobulin levels
Confirm MRI-conditional status of the pacemaker hardware for cardiac MRI planning
18F-FDG PET-CT for staging and identifying biopsy targets
Pericardiocentesis with cytologic, flow cytometry, and immunohistochemical analysis
Multidisciplinary review by interventional radiology, cardiothoracic surgery, and cardio-oncology
Ultrasound-guided biopsy of the most accessible and metabolically active mediastinal lymph node
